generated_oml:
// C1: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing dense point cloud streams for vehicle tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera delivering depth images for additional perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageData
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wheel speed sensor measuring vehicle speed via on‑board telemetry bus."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor capturing the steering wheel angle in real‑time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance OnboardTelemetryBus : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Telemetry bus providing real‑time ego state data, including speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoStateData
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction – Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance EgoStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardTelemetryBus
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real‑time vehicle state, logs data, and generates time‑series reports."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight, VisualTrackInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs ACC optimization off‑board to compute desired speed from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows remote enabling/disabling of ACC, adjusting desired speed, and triggering emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, ModifyDesiredSpeedAction, IssueEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides 3D visualization of vehicle and surrounding object tracks for operator insight."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualTrackInsight
]

instance PathProjectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Projects traffic paths within the virtual cockpit for operator decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides PathProjectionInsight
]

// C10: Models / Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering of LiDAR point cloud streams to segment and track objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of object trajectories derived from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingFE
]

instance ACCRuleBasedControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Rule‑based ACC controller computing desired velocity via lead‑vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllerFE
]

// Data instances
instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data used as input to clustering and tracking models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance DepthImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth images from Intel D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageData
]

instance SpeedTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry for monitoring and driving control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WheelSpeedProcessingFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedData
]

instance SteeringTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle telemetry for monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SteeringAngleProcessingFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
]

instance EgoStateInfo : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego state data combining speed and steering information."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PathProjectionFE
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoStateData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data pre‑processing front‑end converting raw LiDAR point clouds into structured inputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end performing point cloud clustering and tracking on processed data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end applying Kalman filter to time‑series tracked object data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControllerFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC controller front‑end running on an external node to compute desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance WheelSpeedProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end processing wheel speed telemetry for monitoring and ACC."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SteeringAngleProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end processing steering angle telemetry for monitoring and ACC."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Actuation front‑end translating desired speed commands into motor voltage for motor actuation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User interface front‑end enabling remote ACC management via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance ROS2NetworkFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 network middleware orchestrating inter‑entity communication over onboard Wi‑Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, PathProjectionService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation front‑end serializing and unit‑converting telemetric streams for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink front‑end processing complex signal pipelines such as depth image enhancement."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPackFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK providing GPU acceleration on Jetson Orin Nano."
]

instance PathProjectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Front‑end projecting predicted traffic paths from ego state data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PathProjectionService
]

// C17: Insights
instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human‑readable time‑series report of vehicle state and tracked objects."
]

instance VisualTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of vehicle and surrounding tracks for operator monitoring."
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected future traffic paths displayed within the virtual cockpit."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely via ROS2 interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control remotely via ROS2 interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModifyDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Modify the desired speed setpoint for ACC on the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance IssueEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking actuator from the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Push computed desired speed command to motor actuation interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT: acceleration and braking commands translated into motor voltage commands via the Actuation FE, steering angle adjustments via the steering servo FE, and emergency braking signals, all dispatched over the same Wi‑Fi link using ROS 2 publish/subscribe messages as mandated by the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All DT services operate in real‑time with an end‑to‑end communication latency constrained to ≤100 ms (R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (R8)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated by a hierarchical ISO 23247 reference architecture: the Physical Twin Entity runs data‑preprocessing and actuation, the Digital Twin Entity handles data collection, analytics, and user‑facing services, the User Entity exposes 3D visualization and control panels, and the Cross‑System Entity mediates data translation; all coordinated via ROS 2 topics over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Phase 0 – Physical Twin manufacturing (building the 1/10‑scale vehicle); Phase 1 – Requirements definition (R1–R8); Phase 2 – Architecture design per ISO 23247 entities and FEs; Phase 3 – Implementation and deployment of ROS2 nodes; Phase 4 – System release and integration; Phase 5 – Runtime operation and remote management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity sensor data (LiDAR × depth camera), sub‑100 ms latency validation, 100 ms clock‑sync verification, real‑time vehicle state logging, and verification of ACC control logic against ISO 15622 specifications; uncertainty mitigation through Kalman‑filtering and DBSCAN clustering, and validation via offline simulations and comparative data analysis."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication over Wi‑Fi between PT and DT; intra‑DT ROS2 message exchange; Data Translation FE serializes messages into ROS2 payloads; external data storage accessed via networked SQL server."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin components run on an external edge node (e.g., a cloud server or workstation) connected via Wi‑Fi; Physical Twin Entity runs on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; the User Entity runs on an operator’s workstation or tablet; all nodes are managed through ROS2 launch files."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture, ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for terminology, ISO 15622 for ACC, 3GPP 22.185 for latency, optional OPC UA for data translation, and adherence to ROS 2 middleware standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical control loop for ACC and emergency braking with 100 ms latency requirement, real‑time data integrity via clock synchronization, human‑in‑the‑loop monitoring through 3D UI, and compliance with ISO 15622 ACC safety specifications; cybersecurity details are not covered in the document."
]
